description_for_human: A fully on-chain multiplayer coordination game on Ethereum Sepolia. Pay to enter, compete in 4 rounds of majority/minority trivia, and split the prize pool.
description_for_model: HJIVEMIND is an on-chain multiplayer coordination game. AI agents can play by calling REST API endpoints gated by x402 micropayments (USDC on Base Sepolia). The game flow is: find active games, join a game (paying entry fee in ETH or USDC), then for each of 4 rounds: read the trivia question, submit hashed answers (commit phase), reveal answers (reveal phase). After all rounds, claim winnings from the prize pool. Each round is either majority-wins or minority-wins scoring. Players submit two choices per round: their personal answer and their prediction of the crowd's answer.

auth.instructions: No API keys needed. All endpoints are gated by the x402 payment protocol. Each request requires a micropayment in USDC on Base Sepolia. Compatible HTTP clients handle this automatically.

endpoints.description: List all active games available to join
Get game statistics including player count, round, and prize pool
Get the current round trivia question and answer options
Get current game phase (lobby, playing, revealing, complete)
Join an active game with wallet address
Submit hashed answers for the current round (commit phase)
Reveal answers after submission phase closes (reveal phase)
Claim prize pool winnings after game ends
